campaign_lineage.known_issue: Performance dropped after location overlap with purchaser campaign and did not recover.
campaign_lineage.decision_rule: Do not recommend scaling this campaign unless independent recovery is proven for multiple days.

campaign_lineage.reason_created: Reset campaign after Volume Stabil failed to recover.
campaign_lineage.decision_rule: Evaluate as new recovery candidate; do not compare directly as continuation of old degraded campaign.
Evaluate separately from volume campaign and watch overlap risk.
